name: gp-reputation-demo
description: Demo app showing GP reputation scores from pitch decks, SEC EDGAR filings, platform engagement, and LP feedback.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
